name: Raspberry Meringues
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 225°F. Cover a cookie sheet with aluminum foil. In a small bowl, beat egg whites, cream of tartar, and salt with an electric hand mixer until soft peaks form. Gradually add sugar, beating until very stiff peaks form (about 10 minutes). Add preserves and food coloring and continue beating for one minute at the highest speed of the mixer.
2. Drop batter by teaspoonfuls, about two inches apart, onto the foil-lined cookie sheet. Bake for two hours. Cool completely before peeling off the foil.
